findings.summary: Verifier tactical-runner rerun still reports the known unrelated source-token expectation for removed m_closeInProgress state.
findings.impact: This does not contradict TBSCPP-002 acceptance, but it keeps the standalone tactical runner from passing cleanly end-to-end until the baseline test is updated.

test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: harness close waits and orphan cleanup were hardened, non-modal tactical menu/title close vectors were exercised, modal BattleSim unwind coverage was added for both close vectors, and source-contract coverage now rejects IsBeingDeleted-only success and event.Skip lock-in. Verifier reran GuiTests successfully (41 tests) and reproduced only the known unrelated tactical baseline failure.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: AGENTS.md plus the affected GUI test-fixture headers now describe the stronger hidden-or-absent close oracle, idle-driven cleanup, and lifecycle-settle expectations without overstating product behavior changes.

validation_commands_run.note: Failure remained FTacticalGameMechanicsTest::testResetInitializesSafeLegacyCompatibleDefaults at tests/tactical/FTacticalGameMechanicsTest.cpp:61 expecting removed token 'm_closeInProgress = false;'.
